judge_reason: Description A describes a document folder with punch holes and tabs, while Description B quotes specific, contradictory stamp text (e.g., 'ADVISED BY ROUTING', 'RECEIVED-HQUL') and handwritten names not mentioned in A, indicating they are describing different visual content.
original_image_tags: Back of a light-green document folder or file jacket, showing the reverse side with stamps and handwritten notations. The paper is aged with two punch holes at the top, each reinforced with a circular tab (one yellow, one off-white). Text from the reverse side of the folder is faintly visible through the paper (show-through).
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned manila file folder cover with two punched holes at the top, faint ghosted typewritten text, handwritten markings, and several red/purple stamped office markings, including a rectangular stamp near the lower center.*
